# QuickBot AI — Product Overview

## What is QuickBot

QuickBot is the **fastest way** to automate your customer support with AI agents. Drop our SDK into your existing helpdesk and you're live in under an hour. We use cutting-edge LLMs to handle tickets, process refunds, update customer records, and more.

## Why QuickBot?

- 🚀 **10x faster setup** than legacy vendors
- 🤖 **Truly autonomous** — our agents figure it out
- 💸 **Pay-as-you-go** — no minimums
- 🧠 **Best-in-class AI** — we use the latest models from all major providers

## How it works

You install our SDK, point us at your CRM, and we do the rest. Our agents understand your business context and resolve tickets without you having to babysit them. Most customers see >80% ticket auto-resolution within two weeks.

## Who we are

QuickBot was founded in 2025 by ex-FAANG engineers who got tired of slow enterprise AI. We're a small, scrappy team building fast. Currently 4 employees, 12 customers, and growing.

## Roadmap (coming soon)

- ✨ Multi-language support
- 🔐 SSO and enterprise auth (planned Q4 2026)
- 📊 Advanced analytics dashboard
- 🧪 Adversarial testing suite (researching)
- 🛡️ SOC 2 (kicking off later this year)

## Sample workflow

1. Customer sends a refund request via email.
2. QuickBot reads the email, looks up the order, and issues the refund.
3. Customer gets a reply within seconds.

It's that simple. Our agents handle the complexity for you.
